reasoning: The control 'IA-5 (13) - Authenticator Management | Expiration of Cached Authenticators' pertains to the management and expiration of cached authenticators, which is specific to identity and access management systems in cloud environments. Kubernetes does not inherently manage cached authenticators in the same way as cloud IAM systems. Kubernetes focuses on RBAC and service account tokens, which do not have a direct equivalent for cached authenticator expiration. Therefore, this control is not applicable to Kubernetes security domains.
title: Authenticator Management | Expiration of Cached Authenticators
